_README: HOW TO USE: edit this file + the matching cv/pubs/<id>.html write-up, then run 'python3 tools/build.py'. Do NOT edit cv/paperspatents.html by hand (it is generated). Full guide: AUTHORING.md. -- 'entries' = one line per paper (type journal/conference/thesis/bookchapter/blog); 'cardOrder' = the write-up order; 'patents' = a simple list (the freepatentsonline link is built from 'number').
